steps.title: Recognize the y-intercept
steps.content: The point (0, 8) lies on the line. Since x = 0 at this point, y = 8 is the y-intercept.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
With slope m = 6 and y-intercept b = 8, the equation is:
$$y = 6x + 8$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
